resources.string: Call screening is not set up yet.
This Android version does not support call screening apps.
Type or paste what the caller said, or paste a suspicious message. This is sent to the Prahari backend for a real check — no live call audio is used.
Please enter something to check first.
Could not reach the Prahari backend at %1$s. Make sure it is running and reachable, then try again.
No internet - basic checks found nothing alarming, but we couldn\'t run the full analysis. If in doubt, hang up and call your bank\'s official number.

string-array.name: loading_reassuring_phrases
string-array.item: Take a deep breath — we\'ve got this
Ek minute, hum dhyaan se check kar rahe hain
No need to worry, just a moment

resources.string: Tested against 33 real scam patterns — 100% catch rate in our evaluation
Microphone permission was not granted — please type instead.
On-device voice recognition needs Android 12 or higher on this device. Please type instead.
Didn\'t catch that. Please try again or type instead.
No speech detected. Please try again or type instead.
Voice input is busy. Please try again in a moment.
Microphone permission is needed for voice input.
Offline voice recognition doesn\'t support %1$s on this device yet. Please type instead.
On-device voice recognition isn\'t set up on this device. Please type instead.
Voice input isn\'t available right now. Please type instead.
Voice input could not be started. Please try again or type instead.
Couldn\'t find any readable text in that image. Please type or paste the message instead.
Couldn\'t read that image (%1$s). Please type or paste the message instead.
Text extracted from the screenshot — review it below before checking.
Full-screen warnings for risky incoming calls

AbhayAI needs permission to show full-screen warnings so they appear immediately — even when the phone is locked. Without this, a warning about a scam call might not be seen in time.\n\nThis is a one-time setup step, best done by a family member.
Waiting for permission… come back here after allowing it.
Set this up once, together with a family member. It is never asked of the elderly user during an actual call.
Warnings are always spoken in this language first, then in English. If left unset, Hindi is used first by default.
If set, a text with the complaint draft is sent to this number whenever a HIGH risk call or message is detected.
Used only as a last-resort fallback if the missed-escalation evidence agent can\'t reach this contact by WhatsApp or SMS.

For the clearest scam signals only (e.g. being asked to read out an OTP, or being told not to call the bank). Shows a countdown and calls the number below automatically unless cancelled. Off by default — only turn this on if the primary user may not be able to act during a scam call themselves.
⚠️ TEST BUILD: enter a real test number here, never 1930. Tier 3b stays off until a number is set.
Leave as-is for the emulator. Change this only to point at a real network address (e.g. an ngrok URL) when testing on a physical phone. Blank resets to the emulator default.
No trusted contact configured — here\'s a complaint draft you can copy.
Could not send SMS (permission not granted) — here\'s a complaint draft you can copy.
Could not send the SMS — here\'s a complaint draft you can copy.
Listening to why this was flagged before calling for help…
This app only fills in fields for you to review — it never submits anything. You must check everything and press Submit yourself on the government site.
%1$d not found — please fill those in yourself.

No matching fields found on this page yet. If you haven\'t reached the incident-details form, continue through the site (including the mobile OTP verification step — this app cannot and will not do that part for you), then tap Autofill again.
Autofill could not run on this page (%1$s). Use your complaint summary below instead.
Could not load the NCRP website (%1$s). You can still call 1930 or use your complaint summary below.
Use your incident summary (PDF, generated by this app)
Use the screenshot you uploaded on the Check screen
Browse for a file (e.g. a screenshot of the scam message)
Could not generate the incident summary PDF. Please browse for a file instead.
